text: I feel a peculiar sense of solitude moving through this dim, industrial corridor, as if I am crossing between worlds—the known and the unknown. On entering the R+D space, curiosity unfurls; the vibrant colors and curious displays stimulate my intellect. The words on the wall remind me that even in an ordinary moment, I am navigating an adventure of thought, pondering what life and meaning truly are. I am both apart from and woven into the world—an observer, yet a participant in this philosophical exploration.
